description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details  Brown printed kurta made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, is sleeveless, chest buttoned placket, has pleats on the front and a vented hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
